/usr/bin/c++ -I/usr/include/qt5 -std=c++14 -fno-permissive -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-O1 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now          -Wl,-z,pack-relative-relocs -flto=auto -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/hud-gtk-exec.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/hud-gtk-exec.dir/hud-gtk-exec_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-gtk-exec.dir/hud-gtk.c.o" -o hud-gtk  -Wl,-rpath,/run/media/robin/robinScard/codingStuff/arch-unity7/pkgbuilds/unity-base/hud/src/build/libhud-client: ../libhud-client/libhud-client.so.2.0.0 -lgtk-3 -lgdk-3 -lpangocairo-1.0 -lcairo-gobject -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -latk-1.0 -lpango-1.0 -lcairo -lharfbuzz -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lz -ldee-1.0 -lgthread-2.0 -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 ../libhud-client/libhud-client-generated.a -ldee-qt5 -lQt5Core -Wl,--no-undefined /usr/lib/libQt5Core.so.5.15.18 -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -ldee-1.0 -lgthread-2.0 -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -ldee-1.0 -lgthread-2.0
